# Sandra Weise

> Purpose-driven entrepreneur, speaker, and life coach based in St. Paul, Minnesota.

Sandra Weise is a serial entrepreneur, life coach with over 20 years of experience, cancer survivor, and legislative advocate. She helps people transition from autopilot to authenticity through coaching, speaking, and building purpose-driven businesses.

## Ventures

- **Finnish Bistro**: Community restaurant in St. Paul, MN. Team of 25. A local institution.
- **A Better Question**: Podcast about the questions we avoid, the conversations we need, and the relationships that define our lives.
- **The Happy Class**: A DIY alternative to couples counseling — a physical product for couples who are good but want to be great. Tagline: "Making something good even better." Launching October 2026.
- **Resonance Den**: Crystal shop and meditation space. 3,000 sq ft adjacent to Finnish Bistro. Meditation room offered free to the community.
- **Coaching & Speaking**: Two decades of transformative life coaching. Trained under Iyanla Vanzant (Oprah Winfrey Network). Speaking on authenticity, resilience, purpose-driven leadership.

## Contact

- Website: https://sandraweise.com
- Email: sandra@sandraweise.com
